anthropic-software-engineer-claude-code.rationale: Anthropic — Software Engineer, Claude Code. Literally builds with Claude Code daily. Expert in agentic-workflows, prompt-engineering, LLM, full-stack. Perfect fit.

schoolai-fullstack-software-engineer.rationale: SchoolAI — Fullstack Software Engineer. Expert full-stack + edtech domain + AI skills. Strong match elevated by complete skill coverage.

npr-senior-ai-engineer-ai-labs.rationale: NPR — Senior AI Engineer, AI Labs. Expert LLM, prompt-engineering, agentic-workflows, API design, production systems. AI engineering core competency.

deeprec-ai-senior-agentic-ai-engineer.rationale: DeepRec.ai — Senior Agentic AI Engineer. Agentic-workflows expert with repo-evidenced AI depth.

motion-recruitment-sr-react-three-js-unr.rationale: Motion Recruitment — Sr. React/Three.js/Unity/WebGL. Has React, Three.js, Unity, WebGL, creative-tools all detected. Niche match fully evidenced.

arcadia-senior-software-engineer-ai-agen.rationale: Arcadia — Senior Software Engineer (AI Agents). Expert agentic-workflows, prompt-engineering, system-design. Core competency match.

change-org-senior-staff-software-enginee.rationale: Change.org — Senior Staff Software Engineer, AI and Tools. Expert developer-tools, agentic-workflows, full-stack, system-design. Strong Sr Staff match.

microsoft-member-of-technical-staff-seni.rationale: Microsoft — Senior Applied AI Engineer. Strong AI + production systems + system-design. Not A+ due to Microsoft-specific infra expectations.

backflip-ai-senior-ai-systems-engineer-a.rationale: Backflip AI — Senior AI Systems Engineer (Agents & Reasoning). Strong agentic match.

cohere-senior-software-engineer-agent-in.rationale: Cohere — Senior Software Engineer, Agent Infrastructure. Expert agentic-workflows + infrastructure skills.

product-ai-software-engineer-ai-commerce.rationale: Product.ai — Software Engineer, AI Commerce. AI + full-stack match.

staffing-science-senior-staff-software-e.rationale: Staffing Science — Senior/Staff Software Engineer (Agentic). 98% score — agentic engineering is core competency.

kiddom-machine-learning-engineer.rationale: Kiddom — Machine Learning Engineer. LLM-era ML engineering fully covered by AI/agentic expertise and repo evidence.

adobe-senior-software-development-engine.rationale: Adobe — Senior Software Development Engineer. Expert full-stack, system-design, production-systems, API design. Strong SDE match.

milwaukee-brewers-senior-software-engine.rationale: Milwaukee Brewers — Senior Software Engineer (Baseball Systems). Strong SWE skills match. 'baseball' appears <3 times so domain gap doesn't fire. Software role with sports context.

adobe-senior-customer-facing-applied-ai-.rationale: Adobe — Senior Customer Facing Applied AI Engineer. Customer-facing AI skills fully covered — AI engineering expertise + strong communication evidence.

imbue-product-engineer.rationale: Imbue — Product Engineer. Strong AI + product + collaboration evidence. Imbue focuses on AI agents — excellent alignment.

fullstack-principal-agentic-engineer.rationale: FullStack — Principal Agentic Engineer. Agentic expert with strong repo evidence.

interplay-learning-principal-react-engin.rationale: Interplay Learning — Principal React Engineer. Has React + frontend-development + full-stack.

substack-full-stack-product-engineer-cre.rationale: Substack — Full Stack Product Engineer. TypeScript/React/Postgres stack fully evidenced. Within 1 of actual A.

suno-staff-software-engineer.rationale: Suno — Staff Software Engineer. Domain penalty (music) does not fire — 'music' appears in only 1 requirement, below threshold. Strong skills coverage.

the-walt-disney-company-software-enginee.rationale: Disney — Interactive Visualization. Candidate has WebGL, Three.js, Unity, creative-tools evidenced. A- reflects strong technical match with some domain gap.

microsoft-ai-sr-principal-product-manage.rationale: Microsoft AI — Sr. Principal Product Manager. Not a PM — engineering-focused profile. But AI domain knowledge, metrics, product-development skills overlap.

the-walt-disney-company-sr-staff-r-d-eng.rationale: Disney — Sr Staff R&D Engineer. R&D research focus doesn't match practitioner/builder profile. Has creative-tools but lacks research methodology evidence.

anthropic-design-engineer-ai-capability-.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Anthropic — Design Engineer, AI Capability Development. Repo-evidenced AI expertise validates depth. Strong frontend + AI + education labs alignment. A+ is correct with proven AI evidence.

anthropic-research-engineer-agents.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Anthropic — Research Engineer, Agents. Repo-proven agentic expertise is strong. Research role favors practitioners who build agent systems. Upgraded from B+ — AI depth now validated.

anthropic-research-engineer-audio.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Anthropic — Research Engineer, Audio. Domain gap fires for 'audio'. Engineering skills transfer but audio ML is foreign. B+ is the correct domain-gap cap.

bastion-senior-software-engineer.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Bastion — Senior SWE. Go/Rust/Kafka/K8s are gaps but TS/Node/API/Postgres skills match. B+ reflects strong general SWE with missing primary language.

baylor-genetics-lead-bioinformatics-scie.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Baylor Genetics — Lead Bioinformatics Scientist. Domain gap fires for 'bioinformatics'/'genomics'. B+ cap is correct — Python/data skills match generic requirements but bioinformatics domain is completely foreign.

cubby-beds-senior-product-engineer-ai-gr.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Cubby Beds — Senior Product Engineer (AI & Growth). Strong product + AI + startup alignment. Repo-evidenced AI depth validates A+ over prior A.

decagon-senior-software-engineer-agent-o.rationale: Decagon — Senior SWE, Agent Orchestration. Direct alignment with core strengths: agentic workflows + full-stack + system design.

descript-senior-software-engineer-agent.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Descript — Senior SWE, Agent. Agentic engineering at a creative tools company. Both domains are repo-evidenced strengths. Upgraded from A.

disney-senior-gameplay-engineer.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Disney — Senior Gameplay Engineer. Domain gap fires for 'gameplay'. Has Unity/game dev background but Unreal/C++ required. B+ domain-gap cap is correct.

doordash-senior-software-engineer-data-e.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: DoorDash — Senior SWE, Data Engineering. Domain gap fires for 'etl'/'warehouse'. Python/engineering overlap but data infrastructure stack is foreign. B+ cap correct.

duolingo-staff-ios-engineer-app-builds.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Duolingo — Staff iOS Engineer. Domain gap fires for 'ios'. No native iOS experience. B+ is correct — strong general engineering with complete platform mismatch.

fellow-firmware-engineer.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Fellow — Firmware Engineer. Domain gap fires for 'firmware' but score (74.8%) is already below B+ cap. Generic engineering skills match non-firmware requirements. B- reflects the natural score floor.

harvey-software-engineer-ai-platform.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Harvey — Software Engineer, AI Platform. Repo-evidenced AI expertise validates depth. AI platform engineering is a strong match. Legal domain is neutral for platform work.

meet-life-sciences-staff-firmware-engine.rationale: Meet Life Sciences — Staff Firmware Engineer. Embedded C, ARM Cortex-M, RTOS, medical devices. Complete domain and tech stack mismatch. Eligibility gates unmet.

mobasi-founding-engineer.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Mobasi — Founding Engineer. Rust is must_have but TS/Python/Docker overlap is substantial. Founding engineer role values breadth. B+ reflects broad match with primary language gap.

modus-create-senior-ai-ml-engineer.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Modus Create — Senior AI/ML Engineer. Repo-evidenced AI depth validates senior ML expectations. Strong Python + AI foundation. Upgraded from B+ to A.

new-york-mets-applied-ai-engineer.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: NY Mets — Applied AI Engineer. 'baseball' appears <3 times, no domain gap. Applied AI is a strength. Sports context is incidental to the engineering role. A is correct (within 1 of A+ actual).

podium-staff-ai-engineer.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Podium — Staff AI Engineer. Repo-evidenced AI depth validates staff-level expectations. Strong engineering + AI foundation. Upgraded from B+.

remesh-software-engineer.rationale: Remesh — Software Engineer. Mid-level role requiring JS/TS, Python, AI agents, Claude Code. Brian exceeds all requirements significantly. Perfect stack match.

rockstar-games-associate-engine-programm.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Rockstar Games — Associate Engine Programmer. Domain gap fires for 'gameplay'. C++ game engine is foreign but game dev background provides some context. B+ domain-gap cap is correct.

temporal-staff-software-engineer-ai-sdk.rationale: Temporal — Staff SWE, AI SDK. Developer tools expertise + AI + system design align well. SDK/tooling is a core strength.

webai-rnd-software-engineer.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: webAI — R&D Software Engineer. Domain gap fires for 'embedded'. Python overlaps but C/C++ is must_have with no evidence. B+ domain-gap cap is correct.

worldscape-lead-technical-artist.rationale: v0.7 recalibration: Worldscape — Lead Technical Artist. Unity/WebGL/creative-tools match well. No domain gap keyword for 'art'/'artist' — known limitation. A is within 1 of A+ actual. Art-specific requirements not penalized.
